Dear Sir/Madam,
Subject: Audio recording of earnings call for quarter ended June 30, 2022
In continuation of our letter dated August 09, 2022 and pursuant to Regulation 30(6) of SEBI 
(Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015, the audio recording of the 
earnings call held today on August 11, 2022 at 12.00 Noon IST is available on Company’s website 
at the below mentioned path: 
https://www.hikal.com/uploads/documents/HikalEarningsCallQ1FY23-AudioRecording1.mp3
This is for your information and records.
Thank you,

for HIKAL LIMITED
